displayText.headline: Redefining India's Healthcare Standards
displayText.subheading: From cutting-edge diagnostics to world-class recovery, Max Healthcare brings together leading specialists and advanced medicine under one trusted network.
displayText.footer: Max Healthcare Network - Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Punjab & Uttarakhand.

style: Asymmetric, clean Swiss typography, heavy grids, minimal off-white background.
description: Clean grid layout with a prominent left-aligned bold headline in Outfit font. The right panel features high-resolution clinical research labs. Modern minimal borders segmenting the emergency contacts and location details in GeistMono or WorkSans.
